subcodes.first_line: Hallowed praise, transcending word and utterance, befitteth the sacred court of nearness of the Ancient Lord, Whom the clamor of the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر و بیان بساط قرب قدس مالک قدم را سزاست که ضوضای اهل عالم او
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @business; financial; property matters, @praise and encouragement
